title: Master of Business Administration
program_description: Master of Business Administration with concentrations in Finance, General Business, Management, and Marketing.

tuition.notes: Official MEU graduate tuition schedule; the MBA also carries a separate business program fee recorded in university.json.

notes: Official MBA page confirms the program and the four concentrations.
description: Master of Business Administration with concentrations in Finance, General Business, Management, and Marketing.

title: Master of Arts in Education
program_description: The Master of Arts in Education is designed for teachers who are seeking to enhance their classroom skills, become curriculum supervisors, or assume leadership roles in many educational settings.
notes: Official MA Education page confirms the program and its two concentrations.
description: The Master of Arts in Education is designed for teachers who are seeking to enhance their classroom skills, become curriculum supervisors, or assume leadership roles in many educational settings.

title: Master of Arts in Islamic Studies
department: Department of Mediterranean and Near Eastern Studies
program_description: Master of Arts in Islamic Studies with 44 credits, catalog-based course structure, and Arabic prerequisite notes for students without sufficient Arabic background.
admission_requirements: Applicants without adequate Arabic background must complete two prerequisite Arabic language courses outside the MA program.
notes: Official program and catalog sources confirm the degree, department, 44-credit structure, and Arabic prerequisite condition.
description: Master of Arts in Islamic Studies.

title: Master of Arts in Teaching
program_description: Master of Arts in Teaching for professional educators seeking advanced preparation in teaching and instructional practice.
notes: Official MA Teaching page confirms the program and its focus on professional educators.
description: Master of Arts in Teaching for professional educators.
